name: Men's Matte Plastic Square Sunglasses - Original Use™ Black: Scratch-Resistant, UV Protection, Recycled Frame
description:
Matte plastic square sunglasses with a black frame. Showcase blue lenses offering maximum UV protection to keep eyes shielded from harmful sun rays, and designed with scratch-resistant properties for worry-free everyday use. Feature hinged temples for convenient folding and storage.

If you're not satisfied with any Target Owned Brand item, return it within one year with a receipt for an exchange or a refund.

Original Use™: Always the next evolution.
